title: Woodwardia dives
taxonomy: Woodwardia dives is a species of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This family is part of the division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Within the family Blechnaceae, Woodwardia dives is classified as part of the genus Woodwardia, which contains several species of terrestrial ferns. The genus Woodwardia is further divided into several species, with Woodwardia dives being a distinct species found in various parts of the world. This classification helps to identify and understand the unique characteristics of Woodwardia dives.
